key_insights: Why it matters: The development of ChatGPT Work and GPT-5.6 signifies a significant advancement in AI's ability to assist in professional tasks, potentially transforming industries by automating routine and complex processes.

What changed: OpenAI has enhanced ChatGPT's capabilities by integrating it with Work and Codex, enabling it to perform tasks such as coding and generating content, which were previously limited to conversational interactions.

What to watch: The impact of these developments on the job market, particularly in fields that rely on AI-driven automation, will be closely monitored as businesses and professionals adapt to these new technologies.
